method: wc-style word counts as a lightweight prompt-size proxy
budget_notes: Generated agent prompts are compact role prompts with operation details kept in kernel files or role-triggered skill capsules.
Codex prompts are intentionally smaller than Claude prompts for executable clarity.
Skill trigger tokens are tracked separately for Q3b because skill bodies are JIT-loaded only when triggered.
wiki_static_tokens is zero because this repository has no docs/wiki/ tree to distill for this deployment.
Upstream revision f52ae6f is pinned as a submodule and distributes metaprompts only; generated agents, skill capsules, and helper scripts are project-local outputs.
